# Security Checklist: Deduplicate open-data entities

**Purpose**: Validate safe merge enforcement, error isolation, and auditability.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/021-deduplicate-open-data/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Data Safety

- [x] CHK-SEC-001 Low-confidence candidates are never auto-merged.
- [x] CHK-SEC-002 Medium-confidence candidates are routed to review.
- [x] CHK-SEC-003 Publication is atomic to avoid partial canonical updates.

## Error Handling

- [x] CHK-SEC-004 Failures report actionable details without exposing sensitive data.
- [x] CHK-SEC-005 Publication failures leave production canonical entities intact.

## Traceability

- [x] CHK-SEC-006 Run identifiers and configuration snapshots are recorded for audits.
